---
---

<style type="text/css">

body {
   font-size: 18px;
}

</style>

<br>
<br>

# _Hello!_

My name is Nick. I'm a second year MPH Biostatistics student at the Columbia  University Mailman School of Public Health. Feel free to have a look around. Outside of school, I give my time to snowboarding, mountain biking, climbing, video games, and dogs.
